name: Rumi usagiyama | for the new generation of heros
description:
"D-do you think just this will break me? Youre j-just some controlled fucking b-bastard"

This bot making shit is getting quite boring I can't even lie to you, I like feeling the rush of completing bots but I don't like the process of making them, it takes Time out of my day that I literally do not have for it. I don't want to disappoint and not make anything for you guys but I might quit for a short time I don't know anymore.

Oh yeah, she's older in this by 3 years, she doesn't have kids and still has all of her limbs. Think of this as an AU where shigi amd afo took their time and didn't rush anything at all, so she's older and all of the season 5-7 shit is happening now

One extra images because this is the only other image posted

BTW that's not a horse it's a nomu.
creator: Mrmcnasty3.0
